title: Teneggi 2013 social modulation face PPS
citation: Teneggi, C., Canzoneri, E., di Pellegrino, G., & Serino, A. (2013). Social modulation of peripersonal space boundaries. Current Biology, 23(5), 406-411.
notes: Face-centered social PPS task. The preload captures the audio-tactile face schedule, but social partner/mannequin/cooperation manipulations are not GUI fields yet.

provenance.source: PubMed abstract reports tactile detection on the face with task-irrelevant approaching/receding sounds.
The GUI currently has no social-context or economic-game factor fields, so this is an audio-tactile scaffold only.
